We don't just plant gardens — we compose living environments. Every stone placed, every canopy shaped, every light angled to elevate how you experience home.

What We Do

Crafted with intention

Five disciplines, one unified vision. Every Terraverde project is a collaboration between landscape architects, master horticulturists, and artisan builders.

600+

Bespoke Design

Award-winning landscape architecture. CAD renderings, plant palettes, and hardscape plans crafted around your lifestyle.

1,400+

Master Installation

From mature specimen trees to hand-set natural stone. Every installation executed with surgical precision.

Premium

Living Maintenance

White-glove seasonal care. Pruning, soil health monitoring, irrigation tuning, and proactive pest management.

Lifetime

Artisan Hardscaping

Bluestone patios, dry-stacked walls, water features. Crafted by master masons using materials that age beautifully.

LED+

Atmospheric Lighting

Layered illumination design. Moonlighting, path accents, and architectural uplighting that transforms evenings.

Portfolio

The transformation

Drag the slider to reveal each transformation. Every project begins as an underperforming space and emerges as a living work of art.

BEFOREAFTER

Woodland Garden Revival

Lake Oswego Estate

Full redesign, native plantings, flagstone path

Our Approach

From vision to reality

A deliberate, unhurried process that ensures every detail is considered and every expectation exceeded.

01

Discovery

An unhurried walk through your property. We listen, observe sun paths, test soil, and understand how you dream of living outdoors.

02

Design

Hand-rendered concept boards and 3D fly-throughs. Material samples on-site so you can touch every stone and smell every plant.

03

Craft

Our master crews bring the design to life. Clean sites, respectful timelines, and a level of care that borders on obsessive.

04

Nurture

Seasonal tune-ups, proactive care, and a dedicated account manager. Your landscape gets better every year, not just the first.

Client Stories

Voices from our gardens

"Terraverde turned our quarter-acre into something you'd see in a magazine. The stone work alone is a masterpiece. Neighbors stop to photograph it."

42% property value increase
The Martinez Family
Oakwood Estates

"The smart irrigation system cut our water usage by 40% while the garden has never looked lusher. Their horticulture knowledge is genuinely impressive."

$2,800/year saved
Sarah & James Whitfield
Riverside Drive

"They designed our garden around how we actually live — morning coffee spot, kids' play area hidden by ornamental grasses, a fire pit for evenings. Pure genius."

Featured in Portland Monthly
Dr. Amara Chen
Portland West Hills
Service Area

Serving Greater Portland

We proudly serve residential and commercial clients across the Portland metro area. Not sure if we cover your neighborhood? Give us a call.
